item.title: Can focus reflect where you are in your cycle?
item.description: Hormonal changes throughout the menstrual cycle can influence focus, energy, mood, and attention. This explores how those shifts may be experienced, particularly by people with ADHD.

media:content.media:title: Can focus reflect where you are in your cycle?
media:content.media:description: Hormonal changes throughout the menstrual cycle can influence focus, energy, mood, and attention. This explores how those shifts may be experienced, particularly by people with ADHD.

item.title: The difference between “you” and “we
item.description: The words we choose can shape how feedback is received. This explores why “you” versus “we” can feel very different, especially for people who are sensitive to criticism or conflict.

media:content.media:title: The difference between “you” and “we
media:content.media:description: The words we choose can shape how feedback is received. This explores why “you” versus “we” can feel very different, especially for people who are sensitive to criticism or conflict.

item.title: Relationship Miscommunications Explained
item.description: A look at common relationship misunderstandings, how different communication styles can create conflict, and ways to better understand each other's perspectives.

media:content.media:title: Relationship Miscommunications Explained
media:content.media:description: A look at common relationship misunderstandings, how different communication styles can create conflict, and ways to better understand each other's perspectives.

item.title: Why ADHD Can Make Arguments Hard to Let Go
item.description: A look at how ADHD can influence emotional processing, rumination, and conflict recovery, making disagreements feel harder to move past even after they’ve ended.

media:content.media:title: Why ADHD Can Make Arguments Hard to Let Go
media:content.media:description: A look at how ADHD can influence emotional processing, rumination, and conflict recovery, making disagreements feel harder to move past even after they’ve ended.

item.title: ADHD and the pressure to “try harder"
item.description: A look at why people with ADHD are often told to “try harder,” and how that advice can overlook the real challenges involving attention, executive function, and emotional regulation.

media:content.media:title: ADHD and the pressure to “try harder"
media:content.media:description: A look at why people with ADHD are often told to “try harder,” and how that advice can overlook the real challenges involving attention, executive function, and emotional regulation.

item.title: POV: Your Boss Says “We Need to Talk
item.description: A relatable look at the thoughts and emotions that can surface when a simple workplace conversation feels uncertain, especially for people who tend to overthink or anticipate the worst.

media:content.media:title: POV: Your Boss Says “We Need to Talk
media:content.media:description: A relatable look at the thoughts and emotions that can surface when a simple workplace conversation feels uncertain, especially for people who tend to overthink or anticipate the worst.

item.title: A simple ADHD productivity trick
item.description: A practical ADHD productivity tip, based on a simple approach that may help with focus and getting started.

media:content.media:title: A simple ADHD productivity trick
media:content.media:description: A practical ADHD productivity tip, based on a simple approach that may help with focus and getting started.

item.title: The ADHD Experience Nobody Talks About
item.description: A closer look at some of the lesser-discussed emotional and daily experiences that can come with ADHD, beyond the common stereotypes about attention and focus.

media:content.media:title: The ADHD Experience Nobody Talks About
media:content.media:description: A closer look at some of the lesser-discussed emotional and daily experiences that can come with ADHD, beyond the common stereotypes about attention and focus.

item.title: Psychiatrist with ADHD shares top advice
item.description: A psychiatrist with ADHD shares her top advice, offering a personal perspective on managing ADHD.

media:content.media:title: Psychiatrist with ADHD shares top advice
media:content.media:description: A psychiatrist with ADHD shares her top advice, offering a personal perspective on managing ADHD.

item.title: ADHD Symptoms May Worsen Before Your Period
item.description: A look at how ADHD symptoms may change before your period, based on the video’s message from Sasha Hamdani, MD.

media:content.media:title: ADHD Symptoms May Worsen Before Your Period
media:content.media:description: A look at how ADHD symptoms may change before your period, based on the video’s message from Sasha Hamdani, MD.

item.title: What ADHD Conflict Spirals Can Feel Like
item.description: A look at how emotional overwhelm, overthinking, and difficulty letting go of tension can contribute to conflict spirals for some people living with ADHD.

media:content.media:title: What ADHD Conflict Spirals Can Feel Like
media:content.media:description: A look at how emotional overwhelm, overthinking, and difficulty letting go of tension can contribute to conflict spirals for some people living with ADHD.
